@xpath: rules use sxd_document::parser::parse (strict XML) on real HTML. Real HTML has void elements (,
), unclosed tags — not valid XML. All @xpath: rules fail on real Legado HTML responses with MismatchedElementEndName errors.
blockers.mitigation: Use HTML-aware parser (scraper Html::parse_document) to build DOM, then convert to sxd DOM for XPath evaluation. Or use html5ever + sxd integration.

blockers.reason: tocUrl with {{baseUrl}} template (e.g. "{{baseUrl}}/#dir") is expanded to URL then treated as CSS selector, failing with ExpectedIdentityOnPseudoElement. Core does not distinguish URL templates from CSS selectors in tocUrl field.
blockers.mitigation: After {{baseUrl}} expansion, if result starts with http/https or is a path, treat as URL not CSS selector.
